expertAssessments.rationale: Production feature-card modals render the revised static diagrams after the architecture toggle, with primary labels no longer clipped on the checked AI Assistant and Cloud Platform paths.
The static diagram unit test, quick test suite, type check, lint, docs component verification, production Playwright MCP flow, and release pipeline all passed.
GitLab semver tag pipeline 2532228902 completed successfully and production /api/version reports 8.11.169.
